key.name: history-length
key.description: Maximum number of clips kept in history.

key.name: max-clip-size-kb
key.description: Clips larger than this are not stored.

key.name: store-images
key.description: Also keep copied images in the history.

key.name: show-image-preview
key.description: Show thumbnails of stored images in the popup list.

key.name: show-datetime
key.description: Show when each clip was copied.

key.name: show-line-count
key.description: Show the number of lines of multi-line clips.

key.name: page-size
key.description: How many clips are shown on one page of the popup.

key.name: toggle-menu
key.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens/closes the clipboard popup.
